proof: function[T0: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0], x2: Nat, x3: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0) { Option.some(x1) != fin_of_nat_option(x0, x2) or fin_value_or_zero[T0](x0, x3, x2) = x3(x1) }[A](n, i, lib(fin).Fin[n].value(i), f)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { fin_of_nat_option(x0, x1) = lib(fin).Fin[x0].new(x1) }(n, lib(fin).Fin[n].value(i))
function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0) { partial[T0](fin_value_or_zero[T0](x0, x1), x0) = fin_sum[T0](x0, x1) }[A](n, f)

goal: fin_value_or_zero[A](n, fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g), k) = A.0
proof: function[T2: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T2) { Option.none[lib(fin).Fin[x0]] != fin_of_nat_option(x0, x1) or T2.0 = fin_value_or_zero[T2](x0, x2, x1) }[A](n, k, fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g))
function[T2: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T2) { Option.none[lib(fin).Fin[x0]] != fin_of_nat_option(x0, x1) or T2.0 = fin_value_or_zero[T2](x0, x2, x1) }[A](n, k, f)
function[T2: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T2) { Option.none[lib(fin).Fin[x0]] != fin_of_nat_option(x0, x1) or T2.0 = fin_value_or_zero[T2](x0, x2, x1) }[A](n, k, g)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[A](A.0)

goal: fin_value_or_zero[A](n, f, k) + fin_value_or_zero[A](n, g, k) = A.0
fin_value_or_zero[A](n, fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g), k) = fin_value_or_zero[A](n, f, k) + fin_value_or_zero[A](n, g, k)
fin_value_or_zero[A](n, fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g), k) = fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g, i)
proof: function[T3: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0], x2: Nat, x3: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T3) { Option.some(x1) != fin_of_nat_option(x0, x2) or fin_value_or_zero[T3](x0, x3, x2) = x3(x1) }[A](n, i, k, fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g))

goal: fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g, i) = f(i) + g(i)
proof: function[T0: Add](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0, x2: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0, x3: lib(fin).Fin[x0]) { fin_pointwise_add[T0](x0, x1, x2, x3) = x1(x3) + x2(x3) }[A](n, f, g, i)
function[T3: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0], x2: Nat, x3: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T3) { Option.some(x1) != fin_of_nat_option(x0, x2) or fin_value_or_zero[T3](x0, x3, x2) = x3(x1) }[A](n, i, k, f)
function[T3: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0], x2: Nat, x3: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T3) { Option.some(x1) != fin_of_nat_option(x0, x2) or fin_value_or_zero[T3](x0, x3, x2) = x3(x1) }[A](n, i, k, g)

goal: fin_value_or_zero[A](n, f, k) + fin_value_or_zero[A](n, g, k) = f(i) + g(i)
fin_value_or_zero[A](n, fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g), k) = fin_value_or_zero[A](n, f, k) + fin_value_or_zero[A](n, g, k)
h(k) = fin_value_or_zero[A](n, fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g), k)
add_fn[Nat, A](fz, gz, k) = fz(k) + gz(k)
proof: function[T0, T1: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { add_fn[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[Nat, A](fz, gz, k)

goal: partial[A](h, n) = partial[A](add_fn[Nat, A](fz, gz), n)
proof: let w0: Nat satisfy { w0 < n and h(w0) != add_fn[Nat, A](fz, gz, w0) }
function(x0: Nat) { not x0 < n or add_fn[Nat, A](fz, gz, x0) = h(x0) }(w0)

goal: partial[A](fz, n) + partial[A](gz, n) = partial[A](add_fn[Nat, A](fz, gz), n)
fin_sum[A](n, fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g)) = partial[A](h, n)
proof: function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0) { partial[T0](fin_value_or_zero[T0](x0, x1), x0) = fin_sum[T0](x0, x1) }[A](n, fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g))
function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0) { partial[T0](fin_value_or_zero[T0](x0, x1), x0) = fin_sum[T0](x0, x1) }[A](n, f)
function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0) { partial[T0](fin_value_or_zero[T0](x0, x1), x0) = fin_sum[T0](x0, x1) }[A](n, g)

goal: fin_sum[A](n, fin_pointwise_add[A](n, f, g)) = fin_sum[A](n, f) + fin_sum[A](n, g)

proof: function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0) { partial[T0](fin_value_or_zero[T0](x0, x1), x0) = fin_sum[T0](x0, x1) }[A](n, f)
function(x0: Nat) { A.0 = partial[A](nat_zero_function[A], x0) = p(x0) }(Nat.0)
function[T0: Zero](x0: Nat) { T0.0 = nat_zero_function[T0](x0) }[A](k)
function(x0: Nat) { A.0 = partial[A](nat_zero_function[A], x0) = p(x0) }(k)
function[T0: lib(add_monoid).AddMonoid](x0: T0) { T0.0 + x0 = x0 }[A](A.0)
function(x0: Nat) { A.0 = partial[A](nat_zero_function[A], x0) = p(x0) }(k.suc)
function(x0: Nat -> Bool) { not forall(x1: Nat) { not x0(x1) or x0(x1.suc) } or not x0(Nat.0) or forall(x2: Nat) { x0(x2) } = true }(p)
function(x0: Nat -> Bool, x1: Nat) { not forall(x2: Nat) { not x0(x2) or x0(x2.suc) } or not x0(Nat.0) or x0(x1) }(p, n)
let w0: Nat satisfy { p(w0) and not p(w0.suc) }
function(x0: Nat) { not p(x0) or p(x0.suc) }(w0)
function(x0: Nat) { A.0 = partial[A](nat_zero_function[A], x0) = p(x0) }(n)

function[T2: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T2) { Option.none[lib(fin).Fin[x0]] != fin_of_nat_option(x0, x1) or T2.0 = fin_value_or_zero[T2](x0, x2, x1) }[A](n, k, fin_zero_function[A](n))
function[T0: Zero](x0: Nat) { T0.0 = nat_zero_function[T0](x0) }[A](k)

function[T3: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0], x2: Nat, x3: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T3) { Option.some(x1) != fin_of_nat_option(x0, x2) or fin_value_or_zero[T3](x0, x3, x2) = x3(x1) }[A](n, i, k, fin_zero_function[A](n))
function[T0: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0]) { T0.0 = fin_zero_function[T0](x0, x1) }[A](n, i)
function[T0: Zero](x0: Nat) { T0.0 = nat_zero_function[T0](x0) }[A](k)
function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0) { partial[T0](fin_value_or_zero[T0](x0, x1), x0) = fin_sum[T0](x0, x1) }[A](n, fin_zero_function[A](n))
function[T0: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0) { Option.none[lib(fin).Fin[x0]] != fin_of_nat_option(x0, x1) or T0.0 = fin_value_or_zero[T0](x0, x2, x1) }[A](n, k, f)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { fin_of_nat_option(x0, x1) = lib(fin).Fin[x0].new(x1) }(n, k)
